values: Mock Google Sheets structure for the React Team Guessing Game.
What I still need from you
Public tab to publish as CSV
The app renders these as coworker cards.
GameData column A and AnswerKey column A
Facts become draggable items and scoring keys.
GameData column B and AnswerKey column B
Final Spotify track IDs or URLs
Songs become Spotify embeds and scoring keys.
GameData column C and AnswerKey column C
The app uses these to silently POST guesses.
The app reads game data and leaderboard from them.
Protects the app before JS loads.
Google Sheets formulas to paste after upload
=QUERY('Form Responses 1'!B1:V, "SELECT B, V WHERE B IS NOT NULL ORDER BY V DESC", 1)
Publish GameData and Leaderboard as CSV only.
Do not enable Collect email addresses; use a normal Player Email short answer.
